Maximize capacity utilization with Quantum-South's solution with Automatic Package Selection and Ordering.
Maximize capacity utilization with Quantum-South's solution with Automatic Package Selection and Ordering.

Are you looking to enhance your air cargo operations and increase efficiency while reducing costs? Quantum-South offers a cutting-edge software solution designed specifically for the air cargo industry: Automatic Package Selection Ordering.
With our solution, you can achieve optimal selection and ordering of packages inside Unit Load Devices (ULDs), resulting in maximized capacity utilization and streamlined aircraft loading.
Quantum-South's solution seamlessly integrates with air cargo business considerations.

At Quantum-South, we solve complex optimization problems in cargo logistics leveraging quantum algorithms.
At Quantum-South, we solve complex optimization problems in cargo logistics leveraging quantum algorithms.

Our approach consists of combining QUBO, quantum walks and a discretization of the air space. Secondly, we have made great progress creating an algorithm for aircraft climb optimization. Using real flight data with aeronautical and computational expertise, we have a solid, consolidated R&D project with promising applications. We will be publishing papers on both of our developments, so stay tuned for more on this! Our R&D team has two main working lines related to sustainable practices and operational efficiency. Firstly, we have approached the multi-airplane routing problem, meaning, organizing paths from several flights in order to minimize climatic impact – a problem first posed in a Deloitte challenge where we got honourable mentions.

The Uruguayan start-up has become the first Latin American company to join the IBM Quantum Network.

Quantum-South, the Uruguay-based start-up, has joined the IBM Quantum Network to apply quantum computing to the advancement of the air and maritime cargo industry, including the potential for greater efficiency in logistics.

interaction_phrase: access to IBM's quantum computing systems
occurrence_sentence: By joining the IBM Quantum Network, Quantum-South will have access to IBM's quantum computing systems, as well as access to the company's network of quantum expertise and Qiskit Runtime, a quantum computing service and programming model that allows users to optimize workloads and efficiently execute them on quantum systems at scale.

interaction_phrase: has joined the IBM Quantum Network
occurrence_sentence: The Uruguayan start-up has become the first Latin American company to join the IBM Quantum Network.

Quantum-South will continue working on applications of quantum computing in the industry to support air and maritime cargo use cases – all of which require processing and searching large amounts of data.

The startup will use IBM Quantum technology to develop, test, and run proof of concepts of potentially more-effective solutions for cargo logistics, such as efficient container cargo management and fuel optimization scenarios for airplanes, among others.

"Based on our research and product development strategy, we plan to use IBM Quantum technology and resources to continue building and deepening competencies in quantum computing to apply it to cargo industry use cases", said Dr. Rafael Sotelo, Co-Founder of Quantum-South.

"Based on our research and product development strategy, we plan to use IBM Quantum technology and resources to continue building and deepening competencies in quantum computing to apply it to cargo industry use cases", said Dr. Rafael Sotelo, Co-Founder of Quantum-South.
As the first member of the IBM Quantum Network in Latin America, Quantum-South is well positioned to build on our promising work in the area of logistics and optimization.

In addition, Quantum-South will continue providing workforce training to its employees, enabling them to investigate how new potential breakthroughs can be applied to the cargo industry, leveraging IBM Quantum technology.

The startup will use IBM Quantum technology to develop, test, and run proof of concepts of potentially more-effective solutions for cargo logistics, such as efficient container cargo management and fuel optimization scenarios for airplanes, among others.

interaction_phrase: use IBM Quantum technology and resources
occurrence_sentence: "Based on our research and product development strategy, we plan to use IBM Quantum technology and resources to continue building and deepening competencies in quantum computing to apply it to cargo industry use cases", said Dr. Rafael Sotelo, Co-Founder of Quantum-South.

By working with IBM, Quantum-South joins more than 180 IBM Quantum Network members, including ‎Fortune 500 companies, startups, academic institutions and research labs, all working to advance ‎quantum computing and explore practical applications.

occurrence_sentence: As the first member of the IBM Quantum Network in Latin America, Quantum-South is well positioned to build on our promising work in the area of logistics and optimization.

interaction_phrase: map our algorithms to the D-Wave annealer
occurrence_sentence: After submitting an air cargo optimization solution for the Airbus Quantum Computing Challenge one of the future directions of the team was to map our algorithms to the D-Wave annealer and be able to run real larger problems.

interaction_phrase: working in the D-Wave Ocean platform
occurrence_sentence: Now working in the D-Wave Ocean platform and the possibilities with AWS Braket, Quantum-South has been able to scale up the problem and work a model with a significant number of containers.

interaction_phrase: aircraft loading optimization problem for the Airbus Quantum Computing Challenge
occurrence_sentence: The D-Wave 2000Q™ System has up to 2048 qubits and 5600 couplers. To reach this scale, it uses 128,000 Josephson junctions, which makes the D-Wave 2000Q QPU by far the most complex superconducting integrated circuit ever built by 2019 when we worked on the aircraft loading optimization problem for the Airbus Quantum Computing Challenge.

interaction_phrase: working in the D-Wave Ocean platform
occurrence_sentence: Now working in the D-Wave Ocean platform and the possibilities with AWS Braket, Quantum-South has been able to scale up the problem and work a model with a significant number of containers.

interaction_phrase: aircraft loading optimization problem for the Airbus Quantum Computing Challenge
occurrence_sentence: To reach this scale, it uses 128,000 Josephson junctions, which makes the D-Wave 2000Q QPU by far the most complex superconducting integrated circuit ever built by 2019 when we worked on the aircraft loading optimization problem for the Airbus Quantum Computing Challenge.

interaction_phrase: D-Wave Systems Inc. has developed hardware implementation of this algorithm
occurrence_sentence: Quantum annealing is an heuristic algorithm that solves combinatorial optimization problems, and D-Wave Systems Inc. has developed hardware implementation of this algorithm.

interaction_phrase: run larger problems on D-Wave's system than on the IBM one
occurrence_sentence: While we likely will be able to run larger problems on D-Wave's system than on the IBM one, it is important to have in mind that the embedding step of a Hamiltonian uses far more qubits than logical variables in the optimization function.

interaction_phrase: the restriction we had with IBM/Google of the order of 50 qubits, by moving to D-Wave would exceed 100 and reach more than 1000
occurrence_sentence: The restriction we had with IBM/Google of the order of 50 qubits, by moving to D-Wave would exceed 100 and reach more than 1000, which would be a significant amount of containers in our problem.

Published July 17, 2023 by Martin Machin
Maximize capacity utilization with Quantum-South's solution with Automatic Package Selection and Ordering.

Are you looking to enhance your air cargo operations and increase efficiency while reducing costs? Quantum-South offers a cutting-edge software solution designed specifically for the air cargo industry: Automatic Package Selection Ordering.
With our solution, you can achieve optimal selection and ordering of packages inside Unit Load Devices (ULDs), resulting in maximized capacity utilization and streamlined aircraft loading.
Quantum-South's solution seamlessly integrates with air cargo business considerations.
